title: PPIP - Share Data toggle can be changed to ON or OFF while on Guest account
scenario: Guest user should not be able to toggle the Share Data setting ON or OFF
steps: Log in as a Guest user.
Navigate to the settings or data sharing section.
Attempt to toggle the 'Share Data' switch to ON.
Attempt to toggle the 'Share Data' switch to OFF.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle should be disabled or not changeable for Guest users. Guest users should not be allowed to modify the Share Data setting.
